description: Use this API to add a period reserve constraint record to the working case. It may also be used to modify an existing period reserve constraint record. This API must be invoked prior to adding any participating generator reserve units (via OPF_PERRSV_GEN) to a specified period reserve constraint. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_perrsv_main(rsvid, status, realar)

parameters.name: rsvid
parameters.description: A valid period reserve identifier (1 through 15). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status of the period reserve constraint. (input; default value of 1 if new record, current value otherwise, by default).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying The value for each is as follows. (input).

realar.description: reserve limit, in MW (default value of 0.0 if new record, current value otherwise).
period, in minutes (default value of 9999.0 if new record, current value otherwise).

error_codes.description: non-fatal error occurred. Possible warning messages are: - Invalid period reserve status specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
